node.title: SDE-2 / SDE-3 Prep : Mock + (LLD + HLD) Discussion

article.title: SDE-2 / SDE-3 Prep : Mock + (LLD + HLD) Discussion
article.content:
Hi Everyone
I want to connect with few people who are serious about switch for SDE-2 / SDE-3 role (FAANG / FAANG+) in coming few months and can remain consistent.
We can practice mock together and discuss (LLD + HLD) for better clarity & avoid rejection in interview.
We can also share contact details of HR to increase the interview calls.

If interested, please fill out the below form to get connected.
Link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1Sg7rYYDyMOUxBzo-UllZxQFNNLJo_xbufDmI4QqT02g/edit

About me:
Working at FAANGMULA(2022 passout)

I am in really good touch with DSA and paticising more Designing Questions to get confidence.
If you are also on similar track then let's connect.
Thanks

post.content: Try out prepd.tech for practicing what you learn from different resources

Hey I am also 2022 passed out , i am also in good touch with DSA and gave interviews in some companies like amazon , microsoft, media.net . got rejected in hiring manager or hld rounds due to lack of preparation for design rounds and i am preparing heavily. we can connect
In terms of mock HLD/LLD practice I've been using LLM's to study. A site called onsitetooffer.com has some good AI mock practice that could help
